title: vitex trifolia var. unifoliolata
intro: Vitex trifolia var. unifoliolata, also known as the monofoliate chaste tree, is a plant species in the Verbenaceae family characterized by its unique single leaflet. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Vitex trifolia var. unifoliolata include relief from menstrual cramps, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as improved cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made from the leaves and flowers, which can be infused in tea, tinctured, or used in capsule form to harness its medicinal properties.
